name: Curtain Call
intro_text: The year is 1921. You have been invited to the Ward Theatre in Arkham to attend the premiere of a new play — 'The King in Yellow.' From the moment the curtain rises, something feels wrong.
The actors move with unnatural grace. The dialogue is not what was printed in the programme. And the audience around you has grown eerily still.
By the time you realise what is happening, the exits are blocked. You are trapped inside a performance that should never have been staged.
setup_instructions: Shuffle all 6 unrevealed locations and place them face-down in the Theatre's connections.
Place 1 Cultist enemy at a random unrevealed location.
The Mysterious Stranger (03057) is set aside; it enters play during the scenario.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — You escaped the theatre
text: You burst through a side exit just as the theatre's reality collapses behind you. The screams of the audience fade into an eerie silence.
You survived — but the play is not over. Its words have already taken root in your mind, and you know the Yellow King will not be denied a second time.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators escaped the theatre. Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — The final performance concluded
text: The play reaches its conclusion. The King in Yellow takes a bow, and in that moment you understand — you were never the audience. You were always part of the cast.
Something has changed in you. The veil between worlds is thinner now. The path to Carcosa has begun.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators witnessed the final performance. Each investigator gains 1 mental trauma.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Lost to the Yellow King
text: The theatre folds around you like a painted backdrop. The King in Yellow smiles, and you are no longer sure you are real.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at Curtain Call. Each investigator gains 1 mental trauma.*
